Cyber-Ming

中文

Teaching Wiki

Cyber-Ming Protocol

An illustrated teaching wiki for contract-first AI coding governance, audit loops, and evidence-based delivery.

Start With The Loop 中文
Full wiki migration Manifest bilingual switch Existing comics only

01

What It Solves

It is not another agent swarm, and it does not turn the human into a rubber stamp. It teaches the smallest auditable loop: requirement, proposal, execution, evidence, audit, and judgment.

02

The Main Interface

The site interface is a learning map: start with the copy-ready entry prompt, then move through the six sections for protocol, audit, delegation, evidence, and boundaries.

  1. Entry
  2. Minimal loop
  3. Audit and evidence

03

Installation

The repository ships as an npm CLI and Codex skill set. Install the protocol package, then run doctor to check the local setup.

npm install -g @blackzhanzhan/cyber-ming
cyber-ming doctor

04

Teaching Wiki Path

If you already want to learn the protocol, enter the entry page. If you are evaluating the system, scan the six-section map below first.

Enter The Entry Page

Six-Section Map

From Front Gate To Entry Page

00

Entry

  1. Minimal Loop Guide
  2. Minimal Stable Loop Guide
  3. Protocol, Skill, and Web Audit Templates
  4. Comparison With Workflow, Spec-Driven, and Agent Teams

01

Why

  1. Why AI Coding Blurs CS and Management
